title: Cuneiform Tablet #0566: Neo-Babylonian Astronomical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a astronomical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Astronomical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records astronomical matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
